prompt: Design an online learning platform with bright educational colors, animated progress indicators, floating graduation caps, interactive course modules, and gamified achievement badges
prompt_refined: A screenshot of an online learning platform user interface, designed with a vibrant, educational color palette featuring bright blues, greens, and yellows. The main content area displays clearly defined interactive course modules, presented as clickable cards arranged in a grid, each with a title, thumbnail image, and a brief description. Prominently visible animated progress bars and circular indicators are integrated, showing user advancement. Whimsical floating graduation caps are subtly incorporated as decorative background elements throughout the interface. A dedicated section, possibly a sidebar or top-right corner, showcases visually striking gamified achievement badges, depicted as vibrant, embossed, or metallic icons.
objects: Interactive course modules as clickable cards
Thumbnail images on course module cards
Brief descriptions on course module cards
Whimsical floating graduation caps (as background elements)
Gamified achievement badges (in a dedicated section, e.g., sidebar or top-right corner)
